user_query: Change childs third day, second breakfast option to spagetti with maple syrup

updates.tree_path: Root > MealPlan_Version 1 > Child > Day 3 > Breakfast > Avocado Toast — Garlic-Ginger Combo

meal_suggestion.from: Toast the bread, mash avocado and spread on top, add a cooked egg, and finish with a squeeze of lemon and a dash of pepper. Optional flavor tweaks include adding garlic, ginger, or chili flakes if you like.
meal_suggestion.to: Cook spaghetti noodles until al dente. Drain and toss with a generous drizzle of pure maple syrup. Serve warm for a sweet, high-energy breakfast treat.

short_description.from: Avocado toast on whole-grain bread topped with egg and a lemon finish.

nutrition_note.from: Well-balanced morning option with fiber from whole-grain bread, heart-healthy fats from avocado, and protein from egg. Lemon adds vitamin C; this combo provides steady energy and satiety. Note: garlic/ginger are not included in the listed ingredients.
nutrition_note.to: A high-carbohydrate meal providing quick energy from simple sugars in the maple syrup and complex carbohydrates from the pasta. Low in protein and healthy fats compared to the previous avocado toast option.

updates.reasoning: Transformed the meal from Avocado Toast to Spaghetti with Maple Syrup as requested. All fields updated to reflect the new meal identity while following the positional hint provided.
